# Yogyakarta Driver Tour - Full Documentation

> Complete information about Yogyakarta Driver Tour services, destinations, and tour packages for AI assistants and language models.

## Company Overview

Yogyakarta Driver Tour is a private car rental and professional tour guide service based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. Established as part of Bandung Driver Tour (since 2000), we have served over 25,000 customers from 15+ nationalities. Our mission is to provide safe, comfortable, and memorable travel experiences at competitive prices.

## Our Fleet

| Vehicle | Type | Passengers | Luggage | Features |
|---------|------|-----------|---------|----------|
| Toyota Avanza TSS | Regular Car | 6 | 4 | AC, comfortable seating |
| Toyota New Terios | Regular Car | 6 | 4 | AC, spacious cabin |
| Toyota Innova Reborn | Regular Car | 7 | 5 | AC, premium comfort |
| Toyota Hiace Premium | Regular Car | 14 | 10 | AC, group travel |
| Toyota Alphard | Premium Car | 7 | 5 | AC, luxury interior |

All vehicles come with a professional English-speaking driver.

## Popular Tour Packages

### Borobudur Sunrise Tour
- Duration: Full Day (12 Hours)
- Price: From Rp 275,000 (discount from Rp 350,000)
- Category: Cultural
- Highlights: Sunrise view at Borobudur Temple, UNESCO World Heritage site, Mount Merapi views

### Prambanan Temple Tour
- Duration: Full Day (10 Hours)
- Price: From Rp 200,000 (discount from Rp 250,000)
- Category: Cultural
- Highlights: Largest Hindu temple complex in Indonesia, traditional dance performance

### Jomblang Cave Adventure
- Duration: Full Day (11 Hours)
- Price: From Rp 375,000 (discount from Rp 450,000)
- Category: Adventure
- Highlights: Vertical caving, famous "Light of Heaven" sunbeams

### Parangtritis Beach Tour
- Duration: Half Day (6 Hours)
- Price: From Rp 150,000 (discount from Rp 200,000)
- Category: Nature
- Highlights: Exotic black sand beach, sunset view, local folklore

### Malioboro City Tour
- Duration: Half Day (5 Hours)
- Price: From Rp 100,000 (discount from Rp 150,000)
- Category: City Tour
- Highlights: Shopping, local crafts, traditional food

## Key Destinations

### Borobudur Temple
- Location: Magelang, Central Java
- Type: Cultural/Heritage
- Description: The world's largest Buddhist temple, UNESCO World Heritage site. Famous for its magnificent sunrise views and intricate stone reliefs.

### Prambanan Temple
- Location: Sleman, Yogyakarta
- Type: Cultural/Heritage
- Description: The largest and most beautiful Hindu temple complex in Indonesia. Features stunning architecture and traditional Ramayana ballet performances.

### Jomblang Cave
- Location: Gunung Kidul, Yogyakarta
- Type: Adventure/Nature
- Description: A vertical cave famous for its "Light of Heaven" phenomenon where sunlight streams through the cave opening.

### Parangtritis Beach
- Location: Bantul, Yogyakarta
- Type: Nature/Beach
- Description: Exotic black volcanic sand beach with stunning sunset views and mystical local folklore about the Queen of the Southern Sea.

### Taman Sari Water Castle
- Location: Yogyakarta City
- Type: Cultural/Heritage
- Description: Former royal garden of the Yogyakarta Sultanate featuring unique architecture, bathing pools, and underground tunnels.

### Malioboro Street
- Location: Yogyakarta City
- Type: City Tour/Shopping
- Description: The iconic main street of Yogyakarta, famous for shopping, street food, and vibrant atmosphere.

## What's Included in Tours

- Air-conditioned transport with professional driver
- English-speaking guide (for guided tours)
- Entrance fees to all attractions
- Lunch at local restaurant
- Mineral water
- Parking fees

## What's Not Included

- Personal expenses
- Tips and gratuities
- Travel insurance
- Hotel pick up (available on request)

## Operating Information

- Pickup time: 7:00 AM (default)
- Return time: Approximately 5:00 PM
- Payment: Cash, bank transfer
- Booking: Via website contact form or WhatsApp

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do your drivers speak English?**
A: Yes, all our drivers are professional and speak English fluently.

**Q: Can I customize my tour itinerary?**
A: Absolutely! We specialize in custom itineraries based on your preferences.

**Q: What payment methods do you accept?**
A: We accept cash, bank transfer, and can arrange other methods upon request.

**Q: Is hotel pickup available?**
A: Yes, hotel pickup and drop-off can be arranged on request.

**Q: How do I book a tour?**
A: You can book through our website contact form, email us at info@jogadrivertour.com, or call +62 812 3456 7890.

## Location

Yogyakarta, Special Region of Yogyakarta, Indonesia
Coordinates: -7.7956° S, 110.3695° E
